EXERCISE / MODULE 2 / LESSON 3: WRITING A GREAT HEADLINE
WRITING A GREAT HEADLINE
Your headline is one of the most important elements of your webinar
registration page.
You need your headline to:
✓ 	Get them to read the rest of the webinar description
✓ 	Pique their interest
✓ 	Begin to describe what’s in the webinar
✓ 	Dangle the hook for the webinar
When writing your headline:
✓ 	Keep it simple
✓ 	Draw people in with a question, a statement that invites consideration, a
controversy, or a promise
✓ 	Be consistent with the type of content you will be teaching (a great
headline that doesn’t accurately describe your webinar is a bad headline)
✓ 	Use bold, italics, caps and color to emphasize key concepts in your
headline
✓ 	Remember your headline Pre and Post-Heads: Pre-heads go before the
headline, usually to give context or ask a question, post-heads go after the
headline to deepen the communication or make it apply to them
See below for headline examples.
What’s your headline?
